summary: Completed task 1: Added URL parsing and HMAC validation helpers. Implemented ParsedPreSignedUrl interface, parsePreSignedUrl() to extract components from pre-signed URLs, and validateHmac() for HMAC-only validation (ignoring expiry) on write paths. Refactored validatePreSignedUrl() to use validateHmac() internally. Added 16 unit tests covering all new functions. Committed changes.

Completed tasks 2-3: Implemented Use-Stream-URL header support in handleCreateStream with stream reuse capabilities. Also implemented X-Stream-TTL header support for configurable URL expiry. Changes include: checking for Use-Stream-URL header, parsing/validating HMAC (ignoring expiry on write path), verifying stream exists via HEAD request, checking stream is not closed, skipping stream creation when reusing, returning 200 OK for reuse and 201 for new streams, returning appropriate error codes (400, 401, 404, 409), and parsing X-Stream-TTL header with 7-day default. All 126 existing tests pass.

Completed task 4: Created POST /v1/proxy/renew endpoint for URL renewal. Added new renew-stream.ts handler that validates HMAC (ignoring expiry), verifies stream exists, forwards request to upstream renewUrl with client's auth headers, and returns 200 with fresh signed URL on upstream 2xx or 401 on upstream 4xx. Registered the endpoint in proxy-handler.ts. All 126 tests pass. Build succeeded.

Completed task 5: Updated read-stream.ts to return structured error for expired URLs. Modified validatePreSignedUrl to return hmacValid on expiry, added sendExpiredUrlError helper in response.ts, and updated handleReadStream to return JSON response with error, message, renewable, and streamId fields. The renewable flag is true when HMAC is valid (URL can be renewed) and false otherwise. Added 3 new tests for expired URL responses. All 129 tests pass. Build succeeded.

Completed tasks 6-7: Added session credential storage functions (SessionCredentials interface, createSessionStorageKey, saveSessionCredentials, loadSessionCredentials, removeSessionCredentials) and updated client types with new options (sessionId, getSessionId, ttl, renewUrl). Build and tests pass. Next task is implementing session-based stream reuse in durable-fetch.ts.

Completed tasks 6-7: Added session credential storage functions (SessionCredentials interface, createSessionStorageKey, saveSessionCredentials, loadSessionCredentials, removeSessionCredentials) and updated client types with new options (sessionId, getSessionId, ttl, renewUrl). Build and tests pass. Next task is implementing session-based stream reuse in durable-fetch.ts.

Completed tasks 6-7: Added session credential storage functions (SessionCredentials interface, createSessionStorageKey, saveSessionCredentials, loadSessionCredentials, removeSessionCredentials) and updated client types with new options (sessionId, getSessionId, ttl, renewUrl). Build and tests pass. Next task is implementing session-based stream reuse in durable-fetch.ts.

Completed all proxy stream reuse tasks. Implemented client auto-renewal for expired read URLs (task 10), exported SessionCredentials type (task 11), added stream-reuse.test.ts with 12 tests (task 12), and added renew-stream.test.ts with 12 tests (task 13). All 139 proxy tests pass.
Completed all 6 remaining bugfix/refactor/test tasks for the proxy stream reuse RFC implementation
